tasks.title: Conflicting Incident Timeline Reconstructor
tasks.edge_case_surface_area: Clock skew, duplicate IDs, missing timezone metadata, out-of-order log shards, retry/event aliasing.
tasks.recursion_depth_profile: L1 source reliability split; L2 timestamp/entity normalization; L3+ contradiction uncertainty nodes.

fold_points.llm_query: Global chronology arbitration + recovery plan synthesis.

hangups_and_anti_stall: Stop contradiction loop after 2 passes; emit UNRESOLVED_CONFLICT node.
Use deterministic tie-breakers: clock confidence > source priority > lexical timestamp.

tasks.title: Unknown API Contract Recovery Drill
tasks.edge_case_surface_area: Incomplete specs, 200-with-error payloads, polymorphic fields, version-skew clients.
tasks.recursion_depth_profile: L1 endpoint hypotheses; L2 field invariants; L3+ incompatible branch fallback adapters.
hangups_and_anti_stall: Cap hypotheses to top 3 by evidence weight per endpoint.
Persisting conflicts trigger explicit version gate and dual-path adapter.

tasks.title: Schema Drift + Backfill Repair Planner
tasks.edge_case_surface_area: Silent coercions, null semantic drift, dedup ambiguity, partition corruption.
tasks.recursion_depth_profile: L1 table-family scan; L2 column drift taxonomy; L3+ backfill exception routing.
hangups_and_anti_stall: Break migration cycles using write-path criticality ordering.
If lineage missing, continue with reversible transforms and confidence tags.

tasks.title: Policy Stack Contradiction Resolver
tasks.edge_case_surface_area: Overlapping allow/deny, precedence loops, regional overrides, stale fragments.
tasks.recursion_depth_profile: L1 scope clustering; L2 precedence graph; L3+ SCC contradiction patches.
hangups_and_anti_stall: Collapse SCCs into meta-nodes and require explicit tie-break tokens.
Preserve per-region branches until final fold.

tasks.title: Tool-Chain Partial Outage Self-Healing Orchestrator
tasks.edge_case_surface_area: Timeouts, malformed payloads, stale cache echoes, non-idempotent retries, partial side effects.
tasks.recursion_depth_profile: L1 failure class per tool; L2 retry/fallback mapping; L3+ compensation DAG.
hangups_and_anti_stall: Max 2 retries per failure class then forced degrade path.

tasks.title: Flaky Test Root-Cause Decision Tree Builder
tasks.edge_case_surface_area: Seed sensitivity, race conditions, env drift, hidden order coupling.
tasks.recursion_depth_profile: L1 signature split; L2 infra/runtime correlation; L3+ deterministic reproducer branches.
hangups_and_anti_stall: Require minimum cluster support before creating branches.
After failed repro sweep, output quarantine + instrumentation plan.

tasks.title: RAG Evidence Collision Synthesizer
tasks.edge_case_surface_area: Contradictory citations, staleness, hidden duplicates, version semantic drift.
tasks.recursion_depth_profile: L1 topic claim segmentation; L2 evidence graph alignment; L3+ confidence/abstain branching.
hangups_and_anti_stall: Lock evidence graph after one contradiction pass.
Require dual-source support or downgrade certainty.

tasks.title: Legacy Config Merger with Shadow Defaults
tasks.edge_case_surface_area: YAML/ENV/CLI precedence collisions, implicit defaults, coercion traps, deprecated aliases.
tasks.recursion_depth_profile: L1 source normalization; L2 precedence/alias resolution; L3+ ambiguous coercion branches.
hangups_and_anti_stall: Alias chase depth limit 2 then manual-review flag.
Default to string-preserving mode unless schema certainty >= 0.8.

tasks.title: Ambiguous User Story Defensive Decomposer
tasks.edge_case_surface_area: Missing acceptance criteria, conflicting stakeholder intent, hidden NFR constraints, overloaded terms.
tasks.recursion_depth_profile: L1 intent branches; L2 assumption/risk gates; L3+ testable substory variants.

fold_points.llm_query: Converged low-turn path with explicit unknowns.

hangups_and_anti_stall: Keep max 3 intent branches ranked by impact/reversibility.
Carry unresolved assumptions as explicit contract clauses.
